condition: In-scope access, consent, provenance or integrity events are not instrumented or failure artefacts are absent.
decision_effect: Return NO-DECISION; repair emission design before comparing backends.

condition: All relying parties accept one custodian/log log operator as authoritative and dispute risk is not adversarial.
decision_effect: A3 is ineligible by proportionality; compare A1 against A2.
notes: Refines Wüst-Gervais central-database branch for this domain.

condition: Deletion/modification detection is required but a central log log operator remains acceptable.
decision_effect: A2 becomes the preferred candidate unless measurement or legal constraints defeat it.

screen: No trusted log log operator / independent dispute
condition: ADV-3, ADV-4 or ADV-5 is in scope and independent verifiers must resolve inconsistent histories.
decision_effect: A1 is blocked; A2 requires A7; A3 requires A8 and becomes eligible.

condition: The replicated artefact would expose metadata beyond the interface specification/draft FHIR IG/legal traceability minimisation boundary.
decision_effect: A3 is blocked until artefact fields, retention or access controls are changed.
notes: Keeps privacy burden from becoming a mere scalar penalty.

condition: The deployment cannot evidence A7 witness/gossip for A2 or A8 finality/quorum for A3.
decision_effect: Remove the affected property credit; if the property is mandatory, block the backend.

condition: external benchmark run measured cost slots remain requires external validation or returned measurements fail validation.
decision_effect: Do not publish cost-calibrated selection; present only the parametric model and requires external validation slots.
notes: Prevents external benchmark run placeholders from becoming evidence.
